subcodes.title: Du’a’ ‘ala’n-Nafy
subcodes.first_line: O God! I beseech Thee, by Thy Divinity which is exalted above all things, to bring to naught every being possessing the letter Alif that claimeth association with the Tree of Negation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. اللهم انی اسئلک بالوهیتک التی انها هی ممتنعة فوق کل شیء ان تهلکن کل ذات الف ینسب الی الشجرة النفی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for protection, @transcendence; unknowability of God
